summary: Plan-only live PR inventory classification. The hydrated artifact marks all five PRs open and non-security-sensitive. The job explicitly says this is not a dedupe cluster and no shared canonical should be invented, so each PR is kept independently for normal maintainer review rather than closed, merged, or routed to security.

actions.reason: Open docs PR with no duplicate/superseded evidence in the hydrated artifact; keep as independent maintainer-review work.
Open focused bug-fix PR with proof still requested; no hydrated evidence supports duplicate, superseded, low-signal, or security routing.
Open useful contributor PR with unique implementation context and review history; keep independently rather than closing in an inventory shard.
Open substantial contributor PR with unique behavior changes; keep independently for maintainer review rather than closing or merging from this plan-only inventory shard.
Open useful feature PR with its own issue link and validation evidence; no hydrated evidence supports duplicate, superseded, low-signal, or security routing.
